requirement.description: The gateway shall forward the vehicle speed signal received from the powertrain ECU to the instrument cluster without modification.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

GW_VEHICLE_SPEED_ID = 0x102
GW_VEHICLE_SPEED_DLC = 8

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'vector'),
        channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 0),
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def collect_gw_messages(bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == GW_VEHICLE_SPEED_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

def get_vehicle_speed_kmph(data_bytes: bytes) -> float:
    raw = data_bytes[0] | (data_bytes[1] << 8)
    return raw * 0.01

test_cases.title: Verify GW_VehicleSpeed message is transmitted
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; Monitor CAN ID 0x102
test_cases.expected_result: GW_VehicleSpeed message present on CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify 0 km/h is forwarded correctly
Verify low speed (10 km/h) is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle speed set to 10 km/h; Ignition ON

test_cases.title: Verify mid speed (60 km/h) is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle speed set to 60 km/h; Ignition ON

test_cases.title: Verify maximum speed (250 km/h) is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle speed set to 250 km/h; Ignition ON

test_cases.title: Verify vehicle speed is transmitted periodically
Verify VehicleSpeed remains constant if input does not change
Verify GW_VehicleSpeed DLC
Verify GW_VehicleSpeed stops after Gateway power OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_spd_009_stop(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert not msgs_after

test_cases.title: Verify GW_VehicleSpeed resumes after restart
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_spd_010_resume(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
